arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ
translationEn: SAY: "O you who deny the truth!

translationMs: "Aku tidak akan menyembah apa yang kamu sembah.
translationEn: "I do not worship that which you worship,

translationMs: "Dan kamu tidak mahu menyembah (Allah) yang aku sembah.
translationEn: and neither do you worship that which I worship!

translationMs: "Dan aku tidak akan beribadat secara kamu beribadat.
translationEn: "And I will not worship ~hat which you have [ever] worshipped,

translationMs: "Dan kamu pula tidak mahu beribadat secara aku beribadat.
translationEn: and neither will you [ever] worship that which I worship.

translationMs: "Bagi kamu ugama kamu, dan bagiku ugamaku".
translationEn: Unto you, your moral law, and unto me, mine!"
